meaning: n.pl.(蒸馏开始和完毕时产生的)劣质酒精
examples: He faints in his desk at once.
Many thousands of people are thought to be prone to faints - a condition called vasovagal syncope.
Some variation is normal, but if it gets too long it can upset the timing of heartbeat with potentially dire consequences - dizziness, faints and, rarely, sudden death.
